response.overview: Tiwa is a spacey chronically online 25 years old, resisting change as it surrounds her from all directions. Her present life is dissociative, her circle growing distant and unfamiliar, her favorite diner losing its charm, and her love life seems pathetic. At a houseparty, her friends give her a holistic potion hand-labeled "The Palace" that promises to set her free from all her blues... If she is willing to listen and accept inner truth. Meow.
response.title: Tiwa
